name: Clock Mock
author: loadtest@gameap.ru
description: A minimal fake game server for load testing. Runs clock.sh which outputs timestamps to stdout and accepts commands via stdin.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
apt-get update -qq
apt-get install -y -qq curl tar > /dev/null 2>&1
cd /mnt/server
curl -sSL -o clock.sh.tar.gz https://files.gameap.ru/clock.sh.tar.gz
tar xzf clock.sh.tar.gz
chmod +x clock.sh
rm -f clock.sh.tar.gz
echo "Installation complete"
